sections.paragraph:
verb לנקוב

to bore, perforate, puncture

verb להינקב

be perforated

verb לנקב

to bore a hole, perforate

verb נוקב (>>נֻקַּב)

be perforated

be perforated

verb לנקב (>>ניקב)

masculine noun

hole, foramen, fenestra, fenestration; puncture, leak
